ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The academic year (e.g., 2010, 2011) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student cohort */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the cohort for the year */,
  "out_of" INTEGER /* Total number of students assessed */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the cohort */,
  "percentile" REAL /* Percentile ranking of the cohort */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the performance data is recorded */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., Midterm, Final) */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student cohort */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the cohort */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the cohort began their studies */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the cohort completed their studies */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor responsible for the cohort */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year for the report */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
